title: Stablecoin giving grows as 'crypto philanthropy' matures: Report
message_html: Stablecoin giving grows as 'crypto philanthropy' matures: Report ...
snippet: Fundraising platform Giving Block said it faciliated more than $100 million in donations of stablecoins to charities in 2025, a surge possibly aided by a change in US laws.

title: Binance announces new trading pairs for Litecoin and four other cryptocurrencies with stablecoin launching in late 2025
message_html: Binance announces new trading pairs for Litecoin and four other cryptocurrencies with stablecoin launching in late 2025 ...
snippet: Litecoin Foundation ⚡️ (@LTCFoundation): The world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange @Binance announced a new trading pair for $LTC (and four other cryptos) with stablecoin "U" launched in late 2025 and pegged to the American dollar. Available from March 5th with a zero fee promotion for eligible us
